name: Process pressure
description: Industrial gauge/absolute pressure transmitters (process, pipe, tank-head). Distinct from atmospheric `weather-station` (air.pressure) and hydrostatic `groundwater` (water.pressure).
notes: pressure.gauge/absolute are kPa (convert bar x100, MPa x1000, psi x6.89476, mbar /10). Submersible water-column level/pressure probes belong in `groundwater`; ΔP sensors belong in `differential-pressure`.
